backend/main.mo: Main actor for the XinPay backend defining data types (UserProfile, Screenshot, BankWithdrawal, CryptoWithdrawal, BankDetails, etc.), persistent state, and API endpoints; includes authorization and blob storage mixins with a migration hook.
backend/migration.mo: Defines a migration function that transfers `completeBankDetails` map from the old actor state to the new actor state, effectively a no-op structural migration preserving existing bank detail records.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (Active Accounts page fixes, bank account card display, status indicators, form submission flow, empty state) to their relevant source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference document for the frontend codebase structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property color tokens for both light and dark themes used throughout the XinPay UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the XinPay PWA, configuring viewport, theme color, PWA manifest link, Apple touch icon, and mounting the React app via `/src/main.tsx`.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for XinPay specifying app name, dark green theme/background colors, portrait orientation, icon sizes, and finance/productivity categories.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that conditionally renders LoginPage or MainApp based on local auth state, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider with aggressive cache invalidation settings (staleTime/gcTime 0), and includes a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/ActiveAccountsPa: Page component that fetches all bank accounts via `useGetAllBankAccounts` and renders each as a styled card showing masked account number, bank name, account type, and a colored animated status dot (yellow/green/red) based on account status.
frontend/src/components/DepositPage.tsx: Renders a tabbed deposit page with two tabs: INR Deposit and USDT Deposit, each loading their respective form components.
frontend/src/components/forms/BankDetail: Form for submitting bank account details (bank name, account number, IFSC, card info, etc.) to the backend; shows a confirmation state if details have already been submitted.
frontend/src/components/forms/INRDeposit: Form component for INR (Indian Rupee) security deposits that displays bank details with copy functionality and allows users to submit a deposit amount along with a transaction screenshot upload.
frontend/src/components/forms/USDTDeposi: Form component for USDT deposits via TRC-20 network that shows the wallet address with copy functionality and allows users to submit a deposit amount with a transaction screenshot.
frontend/src/components/HomePage.tsx: Displays the home dashboard with INR/USDT balance cards, an 8-action grid (deposit, withdraw, commission, refer, salary, contact), and various modals triggered by each action.
frontend/src/components/MainApp.tsx: Root app shell that manages tab navigation, fetches and syncs the user profile from the backend, renders the active page component, and provides a sticky header with a share modal.
frontend/src/components/modals/Commissio: Modal dialog displaying the commission structure, showing 5% for Gaming Fund and 10% for Stock Fund on referral deposits.
frontend/src/components/modals/INRDeposi: Modal wrapper that renders the INRDepositForm inside a scrollable dialog for INR deposits.
frontend/src/components/modals/INRWithdr: Modal dialog with a form for submitting INR withdrawal requests, collecting amount, bank account number, and IFSC code.
frontend/src/components/modals/SalaryMod: Modal dialog displaying a static salary structure table showing monthly salary amounts corresponding to different deposit levels.
frontend/src/components/modals/USDTDepos: Modal wrapper that renders the USDTDepositForm inside a scrollable dialog for USDT deposits.
frontend/src/components/modals/USDTWithd: Modal dialog with a form for submitting USDT withdrawal requests via TRC-20, collecting amount and wallet address.
frontend/src/components/ProfilePage.tsx: Shows the user's profile info, logout button, and—for admins—a list of all submitted bank accounts with masked details and pending-verification status.
frontend/src/components/ReferPage.tsx: Displays the user's referral code with copy-to-clipboard functionality and share buttons for WhatsApp and Telegram, plus a how-it-works explanation.
frontend/src/components/SupportPage.tsx: Static support/contact page listing XinPay's Telegram VIP agent handles and official channel link, along with a brief company description.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads using AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalAuth.ts: Implements local browser-based authentication using localStorage, supporting signup/login/logout with user profiles storing INR and USDT balances, including a one-time migration to set default INR balance to 1000.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profile CRUD, bank details, TRC20 wallet, screenshot uploads, and withdrawal operations with toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a dark-themed design system, including colors for cards, sidebar, charts, and a custom cyan scrollbar style.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders a tabbed login/signup page using local authentication, with delayed spinner display and silent validation failure handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the XinPay frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, accordion animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the XinPay Financial Management PWA project at version 3, documenting existing features, a known 'Unauthorized' error on the Active Accounts page, and a pending fix request to display bank accounts without authentication.
